top_signals.title: Australia’s Marles Backs Defense Budge
top_signals.summary: Australian Deputy Prime Minister Richard Marles says his country spends a larger share of its GDP on the military than major European nations. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Torc Robotics and Mila team up on physical AI for autonomous trucks
top_signals.summary:
Torc Robotics Mila partnership advances physical AI for autonomous trucking. Torc is now Mila's only autonomous trucking company with dedicated research space in Montreal.

The post Torc Robotics and Mila team up on physical AI for autonomous trucks appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Minera Alamos greenlights Copperstone gold mine in Arizona
top_signals.summary: Copperstone could produce about 46,000 oz. of gold annually over a six-year mine life.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Min Aung Hlaing's India visit set to benefit both sides
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US charges Google security engineer with Polymarket insider trading
top_signals.summary: A Google security engineer was charged with insider trading after winning $1.2 million using confidential company data to place bets on the cryptocurrency-based Polymarket decentralized prediction market. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Commission fines Temu €200 million for breaching the Digital Services Act
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 28 May 2026 Today, the European Commission issued a fine of €200 million to Temu under the Digital Services Act (DSA).

top_signals.title: Bechtel Secures EPC Contract for Sabine Pass LNG Expansion
top_signals.summary: Cheniere Energy Partners has signed a lump-sum turnkey engineering, procurement and construction (EPC) contract with Bechtel Energy for the first phase of the Sabine Pass LNG Expansion Project in Louisiana and issued a limited notice to proceed…
